SeasonTeamId.description: Unique ID of this season/team combination

SeasonId.description: The unique ID of the season this record is associated with

TeamId.description: The unique ID of the team

TeamName.description: The name of the team associated with this record

Active.description: Whether this team is actively associated with this season (true/false)

Gender.description: The gender of the players on the team. Possible Values: Male; Female

Type.description: The type of season/team. Possible values: Club; National

Team.description: The details of the team for the given season/team association
